Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Provide Further Responses To Resquests For Admissions And Corresponding Form Interrogatory 17.1; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Quinton B. Cutlip, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Pamela Bennett

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Plaintiff Pamela Bennett's Motion to compel defendants to provide further response to request for admissions granted; defendant shall serve verified, code compliant, supplemental responses to plaintiff's request for admissions No. 2, 3, 7, 9, 10, 11, 13, 14, 15, 16, and 18 through 32, inclusive, within seven days of the date of service of this order;
2. Motion to compel defendants to provide further response to form interrogatory 17.1 granted; to the extent that defendants' supplemental responses contain responses that are new or different from defendants' first responses, defendant shall provide a verified supplemental response to form interrogatory 17.1 within seven days of the date of service of this order;
3. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, to run against defendant Pine and his counsel, payable within 30 days.
Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2009 Continued To Jun-10-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc And Mtn To Compel Defendant Daniel Pine And Whellan'S International To Provide Complete Responses To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Compel Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Quinton B. Cutlip, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Pamela Bennett

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel complete responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents, granted in part:
a. Granted as to defendant Daniel Pine; defendant Pine shall produce duly verified responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents within ten days of the date of service of this order;
b. As to defendant Whelan's International, motion off-calendar, moot.
2. Motion to compel deposition of Daniel Pine, granted;
a. Defendant Pine shall submit to deposition within ten days of the date of service of this order, at a date, time and place to be specified by plaintiff;
b. Defendant's counsel shall undertake diligent efforts to notify defendant Pine of this order to appear for deposition.
3. Request for sanctions granted as to defendant Daniel Pine; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, to run against defendant Pine personally; request for sanctions against defendant Whelan's International denied. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
